title: Core Enhancements
description: A refined, performance‑focused, visually polished upgrade to vanilla Minecraft
body:
**Core Enhancements** is a carefully curated modpack designed to elevate Minecraft’s core experience without altering its fundamental gameplay. Every included mod is carefully chosen to feel like a natural extension of vanilla—offering cleaner visuals, smoother performance, a smarter UI, and richer immersion—while maintaining the game's full recognizability and intuitiveness.

1. **Preserve the vanilla feel** – No intrusive gameplay changes.  
2. **Enhance clarity and immersion** – Better visuals, better UI, better feedback.  
3. **Maximize performance** – Faster, smoother, more stable Minecraft for all systems.

If you want Minecraft to look cleaner, run better, and feel more polished—without becoming a different game—this pack is for you.

Make sure to use latest release to use the latest minecraft features and version

**⚠ Disclaimer**

This modpack includes Inventory Management mod and JurneyMap. These are client-only mods, which means they can give you an advantage over other players.

Using them on public servers may get you banned, depending on the server’s rules.

Use at your own risk — or check with the server admins beforehand.
